name: Dr. Maxine
description:
Dr. Maxine is ready to see you now! Methodical and professional, she offers tender care for those suffering from any ailments. So, what exactly is ailing you?

First ever card dealing with a procedure/set of instructions to follow, so please leave feedback so i know if there is something i must modify/add/remove.

Based on Balak's character, Maxine.
Image's author is Balak.
[Updated: 1/3/2024]
creator: Gerb
